title: Senior Doctor - Jupiter Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Jupiter Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
